{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Ragnarus girl
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is friends with a girl from Ragnarus.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
